title: Retry deployment of AyurGlow Secrets app

requirements.text: Retry the full build and deployment of the AyurGlow Secrets application, including the backend Motoko actor and the React frontend, resolving any errors that caused the previous deployment to fail.
acceptanceCriteria: The backend canister deploys successfully without errors.
The frontend builds and deploys without errors.
The application is accessible and functional after deployment.

constraints: Do not change any existing application logic, data models, or UI unless required to fix a build/deployment error.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or theme.
